title: Spicy Quesadilla Delight
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on the classic quesadilla, filled with chili and served with a side of salsa.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
In a bowl, mix together the chili, cumin, garlic powder, onion, and bell pepper.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of it.
Add a spoonful of the chili mixture on top of the cheese.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for another 2 minutes.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve with salsa.
